text: Ada Lab headquarters are in Paris. Ada Lab location is Paris. The lab maintains the archive for Widget research.
The Widget inventor worked at the research institute before publishing the Widget design. This note does not name headquarters.
Beta Corp headquarters are in Rome. Beta Corp is unrelated to Widget research.
Starter plan audit logs are retained for 30 days. Starter audit retention is shorter than team retention.
Team plan audit logs are retained for 180 days and exported nightly to the customer storage bucket.
Severity 1 retrieval incidents start in the Retrieval Health dashboard. The on-call checks recall, queue depth, and the deploy marker.
The queue-depth chart helps diagnose ingestion lag after the Retrieval Health dashboard is opened.
SAML SSO disables local password login for managed enterprise users after identity provider metadata is verified.
API tokens must be stored in a secret manager and rotated every 90 days. Tokens must not be placed in trace artifacts.
Refunds above 100 USD require approval from a human billing reviewer. The assistant may draft the response only.
The refund assistant drafts customer responses and collects invoice context before billing review.
SCIM provisioning starts after the customer domain is verified and a test user sync succeeds.
The onboarding training plan covers support channels, audit-log retention, and sandbox limits for new teams.
